__note: MASTER content for /medicare-advantage.html, extracted losslessly from src/pages/medicare-advantage.astro. Illustrative copay examples ($0/$40) are copy, not CMS figures — stay literal. SilverSneakers is a brand — model keeps it verbatim per YMYL rules.

page.title: Medicare Advantage Plans Utah | AltaMedicare
page.description: Medicare Advantage explained: networks, copays, dental, vision, hearing, OTC, transportation, and maximum out-of-pocket. Local Utah guidance.

header.ledeHtml: All-in-one Medicare plans that bundle hospital, medical, and usually drug coverage — often with extras like dental, vision, and hearing.

includes.introHtml: Medicare Advantage plans (Part C) are offered by private insurers approved by Medicare. They cover everything Original Medicare covers, plus often add benefits Original Medicare doesn’t include.
benefitsHtml: Hospital and medical coverage — everything Part A and Part B cover
Prescription drug coverage — most Advantage plans include Part D built-in
Dental — cleanings, exams, and often more extensive work depending on the plan
Vision — eye exams and an allowance for glasses or contacts
Hearing — hearing exams and hearing aid coverage
Transportation — rides to medical appointments on some plans
Fitness benefits — SilverSneakers or similar gym memberships
includes.networksHtml: Medicare Advantage plans use provider networks. Most are HMO (in-network only) or PPO (in-network preferred, out-of-network allowed at higher cost). Before choosing a plan, we always verify your doctors and preferred hospitals are in-network.
includes.moopHtml: Instead of paying a percentage of every service like Original Medicare, Advantage plans typically use flat copays (e.g., $0 for primary care, $40 for specialist). Every Advantage plan also has an annual maximum out-of-pocket limit — once you hit it, the plan pays 100% for the rest of the year.

fit.h2: Is Medicare Advantage Right for You?
fit.intro: Medicare Advantage tends to make sense if:
itemsHtml: You want extras like dental, vision, and hearing built in
You don’t travel extensively for healthcare
You’re generally healthy and want a budget-friendly option

callout.heading: Plans change every year.
callout.textHtml: Networks shift, formularies update, and benefits adjust. We do free annual reviews to make sure your Medicare Advantage plan still fits — or to switch you to one that does.

cta.textHtml: One free, no-pressure call — clear answers, no sales pitch.
